---
format: html
css: styles.css
---
```{=html}
<style>
/* Container for top section */
.top-section {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

/* Left column */
.left-col {
  flex: 1 1 350px;
  text-align: center;
}

/* Right column */
.right-col {
  flex: 2 1 400px;
}

/* Profile pic styling */
.left-col img {
  width: 350px;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

/* Name and subtitle */
.left-col h1 {
  margin: 0.2rem 0 0.1rem 0;
}
.left-col h2 {
  margin: 0;
  font-weight: normal;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  color: #ccc;
  border-bottom: none;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.right-col ul {
  padding-left: 1rem;
}
</style>

<div class="top-section">

  <div class="left-col">
    <img src="images/professionalpic.jpg" alt="Profile Picture">
    <h1>Mark Miner II</h1>
    <h2>Industrial Engineering Student</h2>
    <h2>University of Arkansas</h2>
    <h2>Class of Spring 2026</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="right-col">
    <h3>About Me</h3>
      <p>I am an Industrial Engineering student at the University of Arkansas with hands-on experience in entrepreneurship, operations, and technical problem solving. I built and managed a high-volume swim lesson business serving over 200 weekly customers, where I handled scheduling, pricing, customer communication, and overall operations. My technical skills include Industrial Engineering modeling, linear optimization, and data analysis, along with proficiency in Excel, Java, Vaadin, AMPL/CPLEX, and API integration. I enjoy applying project-based problem solving to develop web applications, automate workflows, and implement AI-enhanced features. In addition, I bring strong communication and leadership skills, gained from managing staff and client relationships, and I am continuously growing my expertise in technical B2B sales and long-term client partnerships.</p>
  </div>

</div>
```
